summary: Backend bug fix verification COMPLETE - All 3 bugs fixed successfully. Fixed additional datetime offset issue in special-ingredient/current endpoint.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Lines 5687-5690: Fixed special-ingredient/current endpoint to use parse_utc_datetime helper for timezone handling
/app/backend/server.py - Lines 5721-5723: Fixed special-ingredient/check/{address} endpoint to use parse_utc_datetime helper
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bugs from the review request are verified fixed: (1) Timestamps now have UTC markers (Z suffix), (2) Happy Hour returns bonus_percent:25, (3) Kernel of Wow holder is a real player (Ramzes, not Anonymous). Fixed an additional datetime offset bug in special-ingredient/current endpoint that was causing 500 errors.

bug_1_timestamps_utc.details: Activity feed and chat messages now include Z suffix on timestamps (e.g., 2026-02-26T01:25:16.718000Z)

bug_3_kernel_real_player.details: /api/special-ingredient/current returns real player 'Ramzes' with valid address 0x664186B0b57CAcb5359039db35F632b91a33ffFa (not Anonymous or 0x0000...0001)

special_ingredient_datetime_fix.description: Fixed 'can't subtract offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes' error in /api/special-ingredient/current endpoint
special_ingredient_datetime_fix.root_cause: MongoDB stores datetime as naive, but Python datetime.now(timezone.utc) is timezone-aware, causing subtraction error when calculating time_remaining
special_ingredient_datetime_fix.fix: Used parse_utc_datetime helper function to ensure expires_at is timezone-aware before subtraction
